title: OpenSEO - Open Source SEO Platform
excerpt: OpenSEO is the open source alternative to Ahrefs and Semrush. Keyword research, backlinks, rank tracking, and site audits, billed by usage instead of a $100-plus monthly subscription. Self-host it free, or connect it to your AI agents over MCP.
content_html:
The modern, open source SEO platform.

Without quality data, AI gives generic advice. OpenSEO is built for you and your AI agent to work together on SEO strategy + content tailored to your business.

Model Context Protocol

Get superpowers with the MCP

Give your agent real SEO data instead of guesses. It can research keywords, competitors, backlinks, and Google Search Console performance, then you can review the work in OpenSEO.

ClaudeCodexOpenClawOpenCodeGemini

Learn about MCP tools

claude · openseo mcp

› find and cluster keywords for openseo.so

⏺ openseo.keyword_research(seed: "open source seo")
  keyword                      volume     kd
  open source seo              1,300      12
  open source seo tools        720        9
  self-hosted seo platform     210        4

✓ Saved 3 keywords to your workspace.
↳ View data in app: app.openseo.so/keywords

Trusted by hundreds of customers worldwide

People should have the option to self-host and customize their tools. If you ever hear someone talking about building their own tool from scratch, tell them to build on top of OpenSEO.

Star on GitHubWhy Open Source?

See OpenSEO in action

Keyword research, competitor analysis, backlinks, rank tracking, technical audits, and AI-search visibility, all on real DataForSEO data and connected to each other.

Discord

sentences.en: The modern, open source SEO platform.
sentences.zh: 现代开源 SEO 平台。

blocks.html_en: Without quality data, AI gives generic advice. OpenSEO is built for you and your AI agent to work together on SEO strategy + content tailored to your business.

sentences.en: Without quality data, AI gives generic advice.
sentences.zh: 如果没有高质量的数据，人工智能就会给出通用的建议。

sentences.en: OpenSEO is built for you and your AI agent to work together on SEO strategy + content tailored to your business.
sentences.zh: OpenSEO 专为您和您的 AI 代理而构建，可共同制定适合您业务的 SEO 策略 + 内容。

sentences.en: Model Context Protocol
sentences.zh: 模型上下文协议

sentences.en: Get superpowers with the MCP
sentences.zh: 通过 MCP 获得超能力

blocks.html_en: Give your agent real SEO data instead of guesses. It can research keywords, competitors, backlinks, and Google Search Console performance, then you can review the work in OpenSEO.

sentences.en: Give your agent real SEO data instead of guesses.
sentences.zh: 为您的代理提供真实的 SEO 数据，而不是猜测。

sentences.en: It can research keywords, competitors, backlinks, and Google Search Console performance, then you can review the work in OpenSEO.
sentences.zh: 它可以研究关键字、竞争对手、反向链接和 Google Search Console 性能，然后您可以回顾 OpenSEO 中的工作。

sentences.zh: 克劳德·openseo mcp

sentences.en: Trusted by hundreds of customers worldwide
sentences.zh: 受到全球数百家客户的信赖

blocks.html_en: All of the value, none of the bloat. OpenSEO is a no-brainer compared to the expensive alternatives!

sentences.en: All of the value, none of the bloat.
sentences.zh: 所有的价值，没有任何膨胀。

sentences.en: OpenSEO is a no-brainer compared to the expensive alternatives!
sentences.zh: 与昂贵的替代品相比，OpenSEO 是一个显而易见的选择！

sentences.en: Fed@foliofed
sentences.zh: 美联储@foliofed

blocks.html_en: I've been using OpenSEO for the past 3 months, Ben keeps launching features to make it the best. I use it every day to find where my competitors are ranking.

sentences.en: I've been using OpenSEO for the past 3 months, Ben keeps launching features to make it the best.
sentences.zh: 过去 3 个月我一直在使用 OpenSEO，Ben 不断推出新功能，使其成为最好的。

sentences.en: I use it every day to find where my competitors are ranking.
sentences.zh: 我每天都用它来查找我的竞争对手的排名。

sentences.en: SamikSubclip
sentences.zh: 萨米克子剪辑

blocks.html_en: It's so straightforward and incredibly easy to get started. OpenSEO gives you the complete setup, stripped of all the fluff that you get elsewhere.

sentences.en: It's so straightforward and incredibly easy to get started.
sentences.zh: 它非常简单并且非常容易上手。

sentences.en: OpenSEO gives you the complete setup, stripped of all the fluff that you get elsewhere.
sentences.zh: OpenSEO 为您提供了完整的设置，去除了您在其他地方获得的所有废话。

sentences.en: Tom RaineLinkedIn
sentences.zh: 汤姆·雷恩 (Tom Raine) 领英

blocks.html_en: People should have the option to self-host and customize their tools. If you ever hear someone talking about building their own tool from scratch, tell them to build on top of OpenSEO.

sentences.en: People should have the option to self-host and customize their tools.
sentences.zh: 人们应该可以选择自行托管和定制他们的工具。

sentences.en: If you ever hear someone talking about building their own tool from scratch, tell them to build on top of OpenSEO.
sentences.zh: 如果您曾经听到有人谈论从头开始构建自己的工具，请告诉他们在 OpenSEO 之上构建。

sentences.zh: 在 GitHub 上加注星标为什么要开源？

sentences.zh: 查看 OpenSEO 的实际应用

blocks.html_en: Keyword research, competitor analysis, backlinks, rank tracking, technical audits, and AI-search visibility, all on real DataForSEO data and connected to each other.

sentences.en: Keyword research, competitor analysis, backlinks, rank tracking, technical audits, and AI-search visibility, all on real DataForSEO data and connected to each other.
sentences.zh: 关键词研究、竞争对手分析、反向链接、排名跟踪、技术审核和人工智能搜索可见性，所有这些都基于真实的 DataForSEO 数据并相互连接。

content_html_zh:
现代开源 SEO 平台。

如果没有高质量的数据，人工智能就会给出通用的建议。 OpenSEO 专为您和您的 AI 代理而构建，可共同制定适合您业务的 SEO 策略 + 内容。

受到全球数百家客户的信赖

人们应该可以选择自行托管和定制他们的工具。 如果您曾经听到有人谈论从头开始构建自己的工具，请告诉他们在 OpenSEO 之上构建。

在 GitHub 上加注星标为什么要开源？

查看 OpenSEO 的实际应用

关键词研究、竞争对手分析、反向链接、排名跟踪、技术审核和人工智能搜索可见性，所有这些都基于真实的 DataForSEO 数据并相互连接。
